use_cases: Showcasing product features with scroll-triggered sticky animations to maintain visual hierarchy
Displaying feature highlights with images and descriptions for SaaS landing pages
Presenting sequential information cards that stick during scroll for engaging storytelling
Highlighting multiple product capabilities in a single section with distinct color-coded cards
Demonstrating complex feature sets with visual context using Unsplash images
ai_summary: A sticky scroll feature showcase component that displays product features with color-coded cards and images. Features sticky positioning behavior during scroll, transitioning between feature highlights as users scroll. Uses warm color palette (yellows, ambers, oranges) with dark mode support. Perfect for SaaS landing pages and product feature sections where sequential information delivery with visual context enhances user engagement.
